name: Linguine Al La Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. Let eggs, whipping cream, and margarine stand at room temperature for 2-3 hours.
2. Cook the bacon until brown and crisp. Drain excess fat.
3. Beat the eggs and whipping cream together until well blended.
4. Toss the cooked linguine with melted margarine.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the pasta and toss gently to combine.
6. Add the cooked bacon, grated parmesan cheese, parsley, and pepper.
7. Serve immediately.
